Title: SACU Spending-Efficiency Gaps over Time
Subtitle: (Efficiency gap, 0–1 scale; higher values indicate larger gaps)
Sources: Source: IMF staff estimates based on IMF (2025a).
Notes: Note: The thick dark-grey line is the SACU aggregate (unweighted mean of the five members); thin solid lines show the individual countries; dotted lines show reference averages — advanced economies (AEs), emerging markets (EMs), and sub-Saharan Africa (SSA). Hollow circles mark 2000 and 2023.

Title: SACU Spending-Efficiency Gaps comparison (2000 vs 2023)
Subtitle: (Comparison between 2000 and 2023)
Sources: Source: IMF staff estimates based on IMF (2025a).
Notes: Note: The chart compares 2000 and 2023 values across three sectors. The thick dark-grey line is the SACU aggregate; thin solid lines show individual countries; dashed/dotted lines show reference averages. The y-axis range is 0.2–0.6; Lesotho's off-chart 2000 value (0.88) is annotated.

Title: Infrastructure Efficiency Gap Across Countries (2023)
Subtitle: (Cross-country distribution of infrastructure efficiency gap, with SACU countries highlighted)
Sources: Source: IMF staff estimates based on IMF (2025a).
